title: Create: blob
description: An addon for the create mod that allows you to get XP in easy ways with blobs!
body:
This is an addon for the create mod that allows you to mix andesite alloys and slime balls to make a blob. The blob is an early game item which when you use it, it gives you 2 XP! However, you can only use it 5 times! So make sure you use the most of them! Imagine creating a slime ball farm, then an andesite alloy farm and mix them together! EASY XP!

- Very early release, will add more items/blocks eventually
- This mod is mainly for fun
